name: Transglobal Management Group, Inc.
summary: The Marquie Group, Inc. (TMGI) is an emerging direct-to-consumer firm specializing in marketing, product development, and broadcasting. It owns Music of Your Life (MOYL), the longest-running syndicated music radio network in the world, broadcasting 24/7 to AM, FM, and HD stations across the U.S. and over the internet to 90+ countries. It also holds a 25% stake in Simply Whim, a direct-to-consumer skin care and healthy supplements brand.
